signals.headline: Chris Dudley Announces Republican Bid for Oregon Governor, Joining Crowded 2026 GOP Primary Field** | YES | HIGH confide
signals.raw:
Chris Dudley Announces Republican Bid for Oregon Governor, Joining Crowded 2026 GOP Primary Field** | YES | HIGH confidence[1][2][3][4][5]

Chris Dudley, former Portland Trail Blazers player who narrowly lost the 2010 gubernatorial race to Democrat John Kitzhaber by less than 2 points, confirmed his candidacy on Monday, January 26, 2026, via a campaign video, ending months of speculation.[1][2][3]

signals.headline: US XRP ETFs Record $12M Net Inflows in April, Flipping Green After March Outflows | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
US XRP ETFs Record $12M Net Inflows in April, Flipping Green After March Outflows | YES | HIGH confidence**
